# Izhar Foster (Pvt) Limited

> Pakistan's largest sandwich panel manufacturer and most experienced cold-chain provider. Cold-chain division of Izhar Group. We engineer the full temperature spectrum — from −40°C industrial blast freezers to controlled-atmosphere fruit stores at +1°C — for Pakistan's food, pharma, dairy, and agriculture sectors.

## Company

- Founded: 1959 by Engineer Izhar Ahmad Qureshi
- Heritage: 65+ years
- Parent: Izhar Group (6 subsidiary companies)
- Manufacturing: 36-KM Multan Road, Lahore
- Offices: Lahore (head), Karachi
- Service: Pakistan-wide
- Site: https://izharfoster.com/

## Products and the temperature spectrum

- [Cold Stores](https://izharfoster.com/services/cold-stores.html) — chiller (0–10°C), walk-in freezer (−18 to −25°C), blast chiller (+70°C → +3°C in 90 min), blast freezer (−40°C air, −18°C core), ambient and dry storage. Capacity 50–10,000 m³.
- [PIR Sandwich Panels](https://izharfoster.com/services/pir-sandwich-panels.html) — ozone-friendly, 0.028 W/m·K, density 60 kg/m³, fire class B1 (ASTM E84). Cores 50/80/100/125/150 mm (up to 250 mm). Lifespan 50+ years. Manufactured in-house.
- [Refrigeration Systems](https://izharfoster.com/services/refrigeration-systems.html) — Ammonia (NH₃) for industrial loads, Freon (HFC/HCFC) for commercial. Chillers, blast freezers, plate freezers, modular cold rooms.
- [Controlled Atmosphere (CA) Stores](https://izharfoster.com/services/ca-stores.html) — precise O₂, CO₂, N₂, humidity, temperature for apples, dates, kinnow, stone fruit. 4–6× shelf life vs cold storage.
- [Prefabricated Structures](https://izharfoster.com/services/prefabricated-structures.html) — steel-frame, PIR-clad. Warehouses, offices, classrooms, sports halls, labour housing. ~3× faster than masonry.
- [Insulated Doors](https://izharfoster.com/services/insulated-doors.html) — sliding, hinged, high-speed. PIR cores, multi-stage gasket seals, heated frames sub-zero.

## Industries

Pharmaceuticals · Dairy · Meat & Poultry · Fruits & Vegetables · Seafood · Logistics & Distribution · Bakery · Beverage · Retail.

## Engineering calculators

Free, client-side, ASHRAE-validated tools at https://izharfoster.com/tools.html. Sized to ASHRAE Refrigeration Handbook Ch. 24 §"Refrigerated-Facility Loads". Cross-validated within ±20% of Heatcraft NROES, Copeland AE-103, Danfoss Coolselector®2, Bitzer Software, K-RP, and University of Vermont's open-source produce calculator.

- [Cold Room Heat Load Calculator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/load-calculator.html) — 5-component ASHRAE method; 22 application presets (15 industry-standard + 7 Pakistan-specific: Mango Cold Store, Citrus Pre-cooler, Onion Storage, Potato Storage, Pharma Cold Chain, Dairy Bulk Reception, Halal Meat Processing); 12 Pakistan ambient cities (Multan, Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Faisalabad, Peshawar, Quetta, Sialkot, Hyderabad, Sukkur, Gwadar, Jacobabad); Izhar PIR panel SKUs (50/75/100/125/150/175/200 mm); live 3D visualisation (model-viewer with AR + heat-flow animation); annual PKR energy cost.
- [Energy Cost & Payback Calculator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/energy-cost.html) — Compare two panel-thickness scenarios. Annual electricity cost in PKR, savings, payback period, 10-year NPV. Pakistan-specific (PKR/kWh tariffs, WAPDA + K-Electric defaults).
- [A2L Min Room Area Calculator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/a2l-room-area.html) — IEC 60335-2-89:2019 leakable-charge safety check. 5 A2L refrigerants (R-454A, R-454B, R-454C, R-455A, R-32). ASHRAE 15 occupancy classes A/B/C. Live compliance verdict with options.
- [Refrigerant Charge Estimator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/refrigerant-charge.html) — Estimate total system charge from line lengths. 12 refrigerants (R-404A, R-407A/C, R-448A, R-449A, R-454A/B/C, R-455A, R-32, R-507, R-290 propane, R-717 ammonia). NIST REFPROP saturated-liquid densities. 12 line sizes from 1/4" to 3 1/8" Cu Type-L.
- [Air-Cooled Condenser Sizer](https://izharfoster.com/tools/condenser-sizing.html) — ASHRAE Refrigeration Ch. 35 THR factor calculation. Pakistan ambient derate built-in. Per-refrigerant COP table for medium-temp and low-temp applications. Auto-warns at SCT ≥ 55°C with evaporative-condenser recommendation.
- [Cold Storage Capacity Planner](https://izharfoster.com/tools/capacity-planner.html) — Tonnage-to-room-size for 24 Pakistan crops (mango, kinnow, banana, potato, onion, garlic, tomato, pomegranate, grape, guava, dates, leafy greens, milk, halal meat, fish, ice cream, pharma, flowers). Outputs room dimensions, panel SQM, indicative project value range, and deep-link to heat-load calculator. ASHRAE Ch. 21–22 + USDA Handbook 66.
- [CA Atmosphere Designer](https://izharfoster.com/tools/ca-atmosphere.html) — Controlled Atmosphere recipe (O₂/CO₂/N₂ targets) + chamber sizing + PSA N₂ generator sizing for 12 CA-storeable crops (apple, pear, kiwi, pomegranate, persimmon, mango, banana, onion, potato, garlic, tomato, stone fruit). 3 sealing tiers (ULO, medium, modified atm). USDA Handbook 66, ASHRAE Refrigeration Ch. 25.
